subject: [PATCH v5 00/21] nfsd: add support for CB_NOTIFY callbacks in directory delegations

reviews.author: Jeff Layton
reviews.summary: The patch series addresses several issues related to directory delegation and CB_NOTIFY callbacks, including proper handling of NULL pointers, RCU protection, and data structure additions. The patches also refactor alloc_init_deleg() into a common __alloc_init_deleg() base with a pluggable sc_free callback.

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch series adds support for CB_NOTIFY callbacks in directory delegations to the NFS server, enabling clients to register interest in a directory and receive notifications about changes within it without losing their lease.
